text: While faith is seen as the foundation of a successful home, many families in the western world are unhappy without realising that they do not understand biblical principles of family management. This study has taken Psalm 127 as its focal point in order to explore the idea of creating a happy home, submitted to the Lord's will and exploring the theological implications of God's sovereignty in relation to the home, concluding that only futility can result from human efforts unaided by God and that only the home that has God as its focal point will be a happy home submitting to God, resulting in Him actively working in our homes to give us the joy and peace we seek.
explanation: Text shows a formal, generic academic style with broad theological claims and no citations, a pattern often seen in AI-generated writing; however, a human author could write similarly.
